text: Create a new repository named 'ml-pipeline' with a Python .gitignore and MIT license on the code hosting platform.
trajectory:
Step 1: Navigate to git.example.dev
Step 2: Click '+' icon in top-right corner
Step 3: Select 'New Repository'
Step 4: Type 'ml-pipeline' as repository name
Step 5: Add description 'Machine learning pipeline framework'
Step 6: Select 'Public' visibility
Step 7: Check 'Add .gitignore' and select 'Python' template
Step 8: Check 'Choose a license' and select 'MIT License'
Step 9: Click 'Create Repository'
Step 10: ERROR: Name 'ml-pipeline' already taken
Step 11: Change name to 'ml-pipeline-v2'
Step 12: Click 'Create Repository'
Step 13: Repository created successfully
